title: SEO Analyst
summary: We are looking for a results-driven SEO Analyst to improve organic visibility, keyword rankings, and website traffic through data-driven SEO strategies.
responsibilities: Perform keyword research and competitor analysis
Conduct on-page and technical SEO audits
Optimize meta tags, headings, schema markup, and internal linking
Improve Core Web Vitals and page speed
Build high-quality backlinks using white-hat techniques
Monitor performance using GA4 and Search Console
Collaborate with content and development teams
requiredSkills: Strong understanding of technical and on-page SEO
Hands-on experience with SEO tools (Ahrefs, SEMrush, etc.)
Knowledge of schema markup and structured data
Basic understanding of HTML and CSS
Ability to analyze traffic and ranking data

title: PPC Ads Specialist
summary: We are seeking a performance-driven PPC Specialist to plan, execute, and optimize paid advertising campaigns to maximize ROI and lead generation.
responsibilities: Manage campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads
Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis
Create compelling ad copies and creatives
Optimize campaigns for CPA, ROAS, and conversions
Perform A/B testing on ads and landing pages
Track and analyze campaign performance
requiredSkills: Strong knowledge of bidding strategies and conversion tracking
Understanding of audience targeting and remarketing
preferredQualifications: Experience in eCommerce or lead generation campaigns

title: Java Developer
summary: We are looking for a skilled Java Developer to design, develop, and maintain scalable backend applications and APIs.
responsibilities: Develop RESTful APIs using Spring Boot
Work with relational databases like MySQL or PostgreSQL
Integrate third-party APIs and services
Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code
Participate in code reviews and debugging
Deploy applications using Docker and CI/CD pipelines
requiredSkills: Strong knowledge of Core Java and OOP concepts
Experience with Spring Boot and Hibernate
preferredQualifications: Experience with AWS or cloud platforms

title: Automation Specialist
summary: We are seeking an Automation Specialist to streamline business processes using workflow automation tools and API integrations.
responsibilities: Build automation workflows using tools like n8n or Zapier
Integrate APIs and webhooks across systems
Automate marketing and CRM processes
Develop scripts using JavaScript or Python
Monitor, maintain, and troubleshoot automation workflows
requiredSkills: Strong understanding of APIs and REST services
Experience with CRM and marketing automation tools
Knowledge of JSON and webhook configurations
preferredQualifications: Knowledge of AI integrations and automation best practices
